events.description: Vibrant Juneteenth celebration with daytime family events. Includes free lunch (hamburger or hotdog with chips and drink), rock climbing wall, carnival games, video game truck, VR showcase, arts & crafts, and photo booth. Day Pass required for Day Pass holder activities. Noon to 5 PM.

events.event_name: Dinosaurs Around the World: Passport to Pangea at Lauritzen Gardens
events.description: Immersive traveling exhibition with life-sized animatronic dinosaurs that roar and move. Journey across ancient Earth and explore prehistoric life. Perfect adventure for dinosaur-loving kids.
events.location: Lauritzen Gardens, 100 Bancroft Street, Omaha, NE

events.event_name: Heroes & Villains: The Art of the Disney Costume at Durham Museum
events.description: Showcase of nearly 70 iconic Disney character costumes spanning close to five decades of film and television. An enchanting, up-close experience for all ages to discover the magic behind the characters.
events.location: The Durham Museum, 801 South 10th Street, Omaha, NE

events.event_name: Strawberry Festival at Nelson Produce Farm
events.description: Berry-filled festival packed with fun activities for all ages. Pick strawberries, enjoy farm games, hayrides, and fresh fruit treats. Celebrate the start of summer on the farm.
events.location: Nelson Produce Farm, 10505 N 234 St, Valley, NE

events.event_name: Future of Rock Festival — Young Musicians Showcase
events.description: Young musicians take center stage showcasing local talent and musical excellence. A celebration of youth in music — inspiring performance and musical community building.

events.event_name: Omaha Children's Museum 50th Birthday Celebration - FREE Play Event
events.description: Celebrate 50 years of play with free admission and special celebration activities. Museum open 4-6pm. This is a milestone celebration for a beloved family destination.
events.location: Omaha Children's Museum, 500 S 20th St, Omaha, NE
